info.title: SOKON Backend API
info.description: Postman collection for the SOKON backend API. Import this collection, set baseUrl if needed, login, then use the saved accessToken for protected routes.

tags.name: System
tags.description: Health, Swagger, and raw OpenAPI utility endpoints.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Registration, login, token refresh, logout, email verification, and password reset.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Current user profile and admin user management.

tags.name: Apartments
tags.description: Apartment listing, search, creation, update, and deletion.

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Student booking requests and owner booking responses.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: User notification inbox and read state.

patch.description: Send this request as multipart/form-data. Do not manually set the Content-Type boundary.

example.title: Sunny Apartment Near University

example.description_en: Student friendly apartment near the university.
